headline: Is WTW's (WTW) New AI and Benefits Push Subtly Reframing Its Long-Term Advisory Edge?
summary: In early June 2026, Willis Towers Watson expanded its presence and offerings by securing a DFSA licence for WTW Investments (DIFC) Limited in Dubai and partnering with Everest Funeral Concierge UK to add 24/7 bereavement support to UK employee benefits, while also launching an AI Workforce Transformation solution built on proprietary job and skills data. Together, these moves highlight how WTW is using AI-driven advisory tools and enhanced benefit services to deepen client relationships...
